# defectdojo_finding_template (Data Source)

Data source for DefectDojo Finding Template

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_finding_template" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `component_name` (String) Affected component name
- `component_version` (String) Affected component version
- `cvssv3` (String) CVSSv3 score string
- `cvssv3_score` (Number) CVSSv3 numeric score
- `cvssv4` (String) CVSSv4 score string
- `cvssv4_score` (Number) CVSSv4 numeric score
- `cwe` (Number) CWE number
- `description` (String) Detailed description of the vulnerability
- `effort_for_fixing` (String) Effort estimate for fixing
- `endpoints_text` (String) Endpoint URLs (one per line)
- `fix_available` (Boolean) Indicates if a fix is available
- `fix_version` (String) Version where fix is available
- `impact` (String) Impact of the vulnerability
- `mitigation` (String) Steps to mitigate the vulnerability
- `notes` (String) Note content to add when applying this template
- `planned_remediation_version` (String) Target version for remediation
- `references` (String) References for the vulnerability
- `severity` (String) The severity of the finding
- `severity_justification` (String) Explanation of why this severity level is appropriate
- `steps_to_reproduce` (String) Standard reproduction steps for this vulnerability type
- `title` (String) The title of the Finding Template
